title: Formula for Slope
text: The slope $$m$$ between two points (x1,y1), (x2,y2) is given by: $$m=\frac{y2-y1}{x2-x1}$$.

title: Using the Formula to Solve for $$x$$
text: Given point1 (x,2), point2 $$(-4,6)$$, and slope $$m=3$$. Substitute them into the slope formula: $$3=\frac{6-2}{\left(-4-x\right)}$$. Solve the equation for $$x$$.
